name: -h
--help
options.description: Shows usage information

name: -v
--version
options.description: Shows versioning information

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: Creates a new Elixir project at the given path

name: -h
--help
options.description: Output usage information

options.name: --app
options.description: Name the OTP application for the project

options.name: --modules
options.description: Name the modules in the generated code skeleton

options.name: --sup
options.description: Generate an OTP application skeleton including a supervision tree. Normally an app is generated without a supervisor and without the app callback

options.name: --umbrella
options.description: Generate an umbrella project

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Starts the current application and runs code

options.name: --config
options.description: Loads the given configuration files

name: -e
--eval
options.description: Evaluates the given code

name: -r
--require
options.description: Executes the given pattern/file

name: -p
--parallel
options.description: Executes the given pattern/file

options.name: --preload-modules
options.description: Preloads all modules defined in applications

options.name: --no-compile
options.description: Does not compile even if files require compilation

options.name: --no-deps-check
options.description: Does not check dependencies

options.name: --no-archives-check
options.description: Does not check archives

options.name: --no-halt
options.description: Does not halt the system after running the command

options.name: --no-mix-exs
options.description: Allows the command to run even if there is no mix.exs

options.name: --no-start
options.description: Does not start applications after compilation

options.name: --no-elixir-version-check
options.description: Does not check the Elixir version from mix.exs

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Prints documentation for a given task (Lists all the tasks if no task is specified)

args.name: task
args.description: Prints documentation for a given task

options.name: --search
options.description: Prints all tasks and aliases that contain 'pattern' in the name

options.name: --names
options.description: Prints all task names and aliases
